glosses.fr: venir à l’esprit; venir en tête
glosses.vi: nảy ra trong đầu; chợt nghĩ ra
glosses.ar: خطر على البال; تبادر إلى الذهن
glosses.nl: te binnen schieten; in je opkomen
glosses.uk: спадати на думку; приходити в голову
glosses.pl: przychodzić do głowy; wpadać do głowy
glosses.el: έρχομαι στο μυαλό; έρχομαι στο νου
glosses.ro: a-i veni în minte; a-ți trece prin minte
glosses.da: komme i tanke om; falde nogen ind
glosses.ja: 思い浮かぶ; 思いつく

translations.fr: Rien ne me vient à l’esprit.
translations.it: Non mi viene in mente niente.
translations.vi: Tôi không nghĩ ra được gì cả.
translations.hi: मुझे कुछ सूझ नहीं रहा है।
translations.pl: Nic nie przychodzi mi do głowy.
translations.el: Δεν μου έρχεται τίποτα στο μυαλό.
translations.id: Aku tidak bisa memikirkan apa pun.
translations.ro: Nu îmi vine nimic în minte.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke komme i tanke om noget.

tokens.explanation: Dative 1st person singular pronoun; experiencer argument required by the verb 'einfallen' (what occurs to whom); not the grammatical subject.
Modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); occupies V2 position and selects the bare infinitive 'einfallen' at clause end.
Negative indefinite pronoun in nominative; grammatical subject agreeing with the finite verb; denotes absence of any idea.
Lexical separable verb in infinitive position; governs a dative experiencer ('Mir') and a nominative subject ('nichts'); clause-final due to the modal construction.

translations.en: This way, I can't think of anything.
translations.es: Así no se me ocurre nada.
translations.fr: Comme ça, rien ne me vient à l’esprit.
translations.it: Così non mi viene in mente nulla.
translations.pt: Assim eu não consigo pensar em nada.
translations.tr: Bu şekilde aklıma hiçbir şey gelmiyor.
translations.vi: Thế này thì tôi chẳng nghĩ ra được gì.
translations.ar: بهذه الطريقة لا يخطر ببالي شيء.
translations.uk: Так я нічого не можу придумати.
translations.hi: ऐसे तो मुझे कुछ भी सूझेगा नहीं।
translations.pl: W ten sposób nic mi nie przychodzi do głowy.
translations.nb: Sånn kommer jeg ikke på noe.
translations.id: Begini aku tidak bisa memikirkan apa pun.
translations.sv: Så här kommer jag inte på något.
translations.ro: Așa nu îmi vine nimic în minte.
translations.da: Sådan kan jeg ikke komme i tanke om noget.
translations.ja: これじゃ何も思い浮かばない。

tokens.explanation: Manner adverb in clause-initial position, setting the frame ('in this way'), triggering V2 word order.
Modal auxiliary (present, 3rd person singular form) expressing possibility; occupies V2 and selects the infinitive 'einfallen'.
Dative 1st person singular pronoun; experiencer argument of 'einfallen'.
Negative indefinite pronoun in nominative; grammatical subject.
Separable lexical verb in infinitive; clause-final due to the modal; selects dative experiencer and nominative subject.

translations.es: Seguro que se le ocurrirá algo.
translations.it: Di sicuro gli verrà in mente qualcosa.
translations.pt: Ele com certeza vai ter uma ideia.
translations.vi: Anh ấy chắc chắn sẽ nghĩ ra gì đó.
translations.ro: Cu siguranță îi va veni o idee.
translations.da: Han skal nok finde på noget.
translations.ja: 彼はきっと何か思いつく。

tokens.explanation: Dative 3rd person singular pronoun; experiencer argument of 'einfallen'.
Auxiliary 'werden' (3rd person singular, present) forming future; V2 position; selects the infinitive 'einfallen' at clause end.
Sentence adverb expressing speaker certainty; modifies the whole proposition.
Indefinite pronoun in nominative; grammatical subject.
Lexical separable verb in infinitive; clause-final due to auxiliary; takes dative experiencer ('Ihm') and nominative subject ('etwas').

sentences.target: Jetzt sollte uns ein besserer Plan einfallen.
sentences.reading: /jɛtst ˈzɔltə ʊns aɪ̯n ˈbɛsərɐ plaːn ˈaɪ̯nfalən/

translations.de: Jetzt sollte uns ein besserer Plan einfallen.
translations.ipa: /jɛtst ˈzɔltə ʊns aɪ̯n ˈbɛsərɐ plaːn ˈaɪ̯nfalən/
translations.en: Now we should think of a better plan.
translations.es: Ahora deberíamos pensar en un plan mejor.
translations.fr: Maintenant, on devrait trouver un meilleur plan.
translations.it: Adesso dovremmo pensare a un piano migliore.
translations.ko: 이제 우리는 더 좋은 계획을 생각해내야 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 现在我们该想个更好的计划了。
translations.yue: 而家我哋應該諗個更好嘅計劃。
translations.ru: Сейчас нам стоит придумать план получше.
translations.pt: Agora deveríamos pensar em um plano melhor.
translations.he: עכשיו כדאי שנחשוב על תוכנית טובה יותר.
translations.tr: Şimdi daha iyi bir plan düşünmeliyiz.
translations.vi: Giờ chúng ta nên nghĩ ra một kế hoạch tốt hơn.
translations.ar: الآن ينبغي أن نفكر في خطة أفضل.
translations.nl: Nu zouden we een beter plan moeten bedenken.
translations.uk: Зараз нам слід придумати кращий план.
translations.hu: Most egy jobb tervet kellene kitalálnunk.
translations.hi: अब हमें एक बेहतर योजना सोचनी चाहिए।
translations.el: Τώρα θα έπρεπε να σκεφτούμε ένα καλύτερο σχέδιο.
translations.nb: Nå burde vi finne en bedre плah.
translations.id: Sekarang kita sebaiknya memikirkan rencana yang lebih baik.
translations.sv: Nu borde vi komma på en bättre plan.
translations.ro: Acum ar trebui să ne gândim la un plan mai bun.
translations.cs: Teď bychom měli vymyslet lepší plán.
translations.da: Nu bør vi finde på en bedre plan.
translations.fi: Nyt meidän pitäisi keksiä parempi suunnitelma.
translations.ja: 今はもっといい計画を考えるべिकだ。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb in clause-initial position; frames the time reference.
Modal auxiliary (preterite/irrealis form) expressing advisability; finite verb in V2; selects the infinitive 'einfallen'.
Dative 1st person plural pronoun; experiencer argument of 'einfallen'.
Indefinite article introducing the subject noun phrase; agrees with masculine nominative singular.
Attributive adjective (comparative) with strong ending -er; modifies 'Plan' within the subject NP.
Noun, masculine nominative singular; head of the subject NP of 'einfallen'.
Lexical separable verb in infinitive; clause-final due to modal; governs dative experiencer ('uns') and nominative subject ('ein besserer Plan').
